nasb.text: Now when Athaliah the mother of Ahaziah saw that her son was dead, she rose and destroyed all the royal offspring of the house of Judah.

esv.text: Now when Athaliah the mother of Ahaziah saw that her son was dead, she arose and destroyed all the royal family of the house of Judah.

cnv.text: 亞哈謝的母親亞他利雅見自己的兒子死了，就起來殺盡猶大家中所有王族的後裔。

ccb.text: 亚哈谢的母亲亚她利雅见她儿子死了，便决定除掉犹大王室的后裔。
